answer: The Eiffel Tower is 330 meters tall. It was completed in 1889. It remains a prominent landmark in Paris.

results.title: Construction and height of the Eiffel Tower - Facebook
results.snippet: The tower is 324 meters (1,063 ft) tall and is the tallest structure in Paris. Its base is square, measuring 125 meters (410 ft) on each side.

results.title: Gustave Eiffel, The Eiffel Tower - YouTube
results.snippet: Gustave Eiffel, Eiffel Tower, built for the 1889 Universal Exposition, Paris, 1887–89, puddled iron, 1083 feet tall.

results.title: Discover the Eiffel Tower, the greatest symbol of Paris!

results.title: 10 Fascinating Eiffel Tower Facts you should know | Tootbus
results.snippet: While today Paris wouldn’t be Paris without the Eiffel Tower, responses to the plans for the **300-metre** structure were not initially unanimously favourable. **Guy de Maupassant**, who despised the edifice, regularly ate lunch in the Eiffel Tower‘s first floor restaurant as it was the only place in Paris where he could eat without seeing the metal structure he hated so much. **Gustave Eiffel**‘s role in this project was to bring it to the attention of French political leaders, and to obtain their consent to construct the tower for the **1889 world’s fair in Paris**. ### When was the Eiffel Tower build? ### Where to eat at the Eiffel Tower? ### The Eiffel Tower, a majestic backdrop for the Paris 2024 Olympics. The **Eiffel Tower** played an iconic role during the **Paris 2024 Olympics**. On our **hop-on hop-off Paris bus tour** line, our Tootbus buses make an **essential stop at the Eiffel Tower**, so that you can enjoy the majestic Iron Lady.
